headline: Oil Jumps On Iran Strikes, Nasdaq 100 Falls On Hot Inflation: Stock Market Today
summary: Oil surged and gold tumbled as renewed U.S.-Iran strikes hit the Gulf, while a tech selloff and a hot 4.2% CPI dragged Wall Street lower.
